<think>
The instruction requires determining citation and reference relationships among provided papers and presenting them in a specific JSON format. The relations structure is a mapping with keys representing each document (DOC1, DOC2, DOC3) and values containing lists of references and citations. I will map these values directly into the required JSON format, ensuring that each document's references and citations are listed accurately.
